component.name: ICD360S Mail Client
component.summary: Modern email client with mTLS auth, PGP, and threat detection

description.p: ICD360S Mail Client is a desktop email client built for users of the ICD360S e.V. mail infrastructure. It uses mutual-TLS for IMAP and SMTP authentication (no passwords sent over the wire), end-to-end PGP encryption (RFC 9580 — Ed25519 signing, X25519 encryption), and integrated phishing / threat detection on incoming mail.
Features:

ul.li: mTLS-only authentication — no IMAP/SMTP password ever leaves the device
Inline PDF and image preview via PDFium (no WebView dependency)
Phishing and DKIM/SPF/DMARC inspection per message
Self-hosted update channel with signed releases (no app-store dependency)

description.p: Maintenance release. See the GitHub release notes for details.

Maintenance release. See the GitHub release notes for details.
Maintenance release. See the GitHub release notes for details.
Maintenance release. See the GitHub release notes for details.

Self-hosted Flatpak OSTree repository at mail.icd360s.de — users can now `flatpak remote-add icd360s` once and receive future updates through GNOME Software / Discover instead of the single-bundle install path.
Broaden Flatpak detection with FLATPAK_ID env var fallback so the in-app updater is suppressed even when /.flatpak-info is unreadable under stricter portal policies.

Flatpak release: bundle libsecret-1, drop the unused Background portal claim, and skip the in-app updater when running inside the Flatpak sandbox. Fixes the "Update failed" + spinner-disappears symptom.
Initial Flatpak bundle + raw tar.gz support for Fedora Silverblue / Kinoite toolbox installs.
Sentry init hardening: disable native crash handling on Android and add a 10-second timeout so a stuck SDK init can never block app startup.
Sentry crash monitoring shipped to production. Windows startup fix series resolved.
